text.title: Claude Code & Cursor at Solo Tier Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Operator runs Opus for every task; monthly bill 5x what it should be.
antipattern.fix: Apply routing table: design/cross-file → Opus; routine → Sonnet; mechanical → Haiku.

antipattern.symptom: Each session starts with 'what does this codebase do?'; tokens wasted on rediscovery.
antipattern.fix: Add CLAUDE.md (= @AGENTS.md) + AGENTS.md (≤80 lines, file table + key types).

antipattern.symptom: Operator pastes 50K tokens of repo into prompt; quality drops; rate-limited.
antipattern.fix: Use ≤2K tokens of targeted context; let Claude Code's grep/read handle the rest.

antipattern.symptom: Asks 'refactor auth'; AI returns 600 LOC across 8 files; nothing tested.
antipattern.fix: Force spec_before_code; mandate done-criteria + test plan before code request.
